measure.$description: Ledes run shorter than body measure.

font-family.$description: Font family for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.

font-size.$description: Font size for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.

line-height.$description: Line height for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.

letter-spacing.$description: Tracking for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.

spacing-before.$description: Block spacing before introductory lede text when it appears in a .prose flow.

spacing-after.$description: Block spacing after introductory lede text when it appears in a .prose flow.

color.$description: Text color for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.

font-style.$description: Font style for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.

text-transform.$description: Text transform for introductory lede text with .lede applied directly or as a child of a .prose container.
